zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Leeke於大約1371年出生在英國德比夏爾德比時，她的父親John Leeke23歲，母親Isabel Towers23歲。她和Sir Thomas Rempston至少有1個兒子。她去世於1440年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德比享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Leeke于大约1371年出生在英国德比夏爾德比时，她的父亲John Leeke23岁，母亲Isabel Towers23岁。她和Sir Thomas Rempston至少有1个儿子。她去世于1440年在英国英格兰德比夏爾德比享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leeke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leake
meanings: habitational name from Leake (Lincolnshire), East and West Leake (Nottinghamshire), Leek (Staffordshire), Leck (Lancashire), Leak (NorthYorkshire), or Leak Hall in Cumberworth (West Yorkshire). The placenames derive from Old English lece or Old Scandinavian lœkr, both meaning ‘brook’. See also Like .
possibly also a nickname from Middle English lek ‘leek’ (Old English lēac), perhaps for a grower or seller of leeks.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Leeke was born about 1371, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, her father, John Leeke, was 23 and her mother, Isabel Towers, was 23. She had at least 1 son with Sir Thomas Rempston. She died in 1440, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Leeke est née environ 1371, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Leeke, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Towers, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Thomas Rempston. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Leeke um 1371 in Derby, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Leeke 23 und ihre Mutter Isabel Towers 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Rempston mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Leeke è nata il circa 1371 nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, John Leeke, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Isabel Towers, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Thomas Rempston. Morì nel 1440, nel Derby, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Leeke(이)가 대략 1371년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Leeke(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Towers(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Rempston(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 더비에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
